    start (str): The starting node.
    end (str): The destination node.

    while queue:
        current = queue.pop(0)
        if not graph[current]:
            continue
        for neighbor, weight in graph[current]:
            if neighbor == end:
                return current, end
            queue.append(neighbor)
    return None
